CustomField.description: Formula checkbox: true when nepa_page_count__c exceeds nepa_fra_page_limit__c for a core text file (nepa_is_appendix__c = false). Drives the FRA Page Limit Compliance Report filter and the NEPA_SLA_Escalation_Monitor warning. False/null for appendices, CE documents, and files without page counts.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: True when this document exceeds its FRA statutory page limit. Appendices are excluded from this calculation.
CustomField.formula: AND( NOT(nepa_is_appendix__c), NOT(ISBLANK(nepa_page_count__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(nepa_fra_page_limit__c)), nepa_page_count__c > nepa_fra_page_limit__c )
CustomField.label: FRA Page Limit Exceeded
